---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for ArchAI
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## 💡 Feature Summary

A clear, one-sentence summary of the feature.

## 🎯 Problem / Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? Who benefits from it?

_Example: "When analyzing large monorepos, it's difficult to focus on a specific service without seeing the entire graph."_

## 🔧 Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you considered?

## 📸 Mockups or Examples

If applicable, add screenshots, mockups, or links to similar features in other tools.

## 📊 Priority / Impact

How important is this to you?
- [ ] Critical — I can't use ArchAI without this
- [ ] High — This would significantly improve my workflow
- [ ] Medium — Nice to have
- [ ] Low — Minor improvement

## 📝 Additional Context

Any other context, links, or information about the feature request.
